text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the day of the long-awaited Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun vows to steal my heart with a
brilliant race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She flies off toward the track with great
enthusiasm.
